name: Nvidia
philosophy: | An engineering-grade marketing system organized around two surface modes — a deep black canvas for hero and footer chapters and a flat paper-white canvas for body content — connected by a single, almost violently saturated NVIDIA Green accent that carries every CTA, every active tab, and the small decorative corner squares that mark out cards.
trademark_signals: Single-accent system: carries every CTA, active state, and decorative motif. The rest is monochrome black/white/gray
Two-mode surface architecture: for hero/footer chapters; for body — alternating in a predictable rhythm down the page
Hyper-angular geometry: (2px) on every interactive element. There are no pill buttons, no rounded cards, no soft chrome
NVIDIA-EMEA proprietary sans-serif at weights 400 and 700, scaled across a 12-tier hierarchy from (10px) up to (48px)
Card library leans on hairline borders and backgrounds rather than shadows for separation
ai_slop_avoided: introduce drop shadows on cards or content surfaces. The only allowed shadow is the 5px ambient on sticky chrome
substitute , or any other green for in CTAs. The brand green is precise
use outside of inline body-prose links. It is not a button color, not a chrome color
